The Total Uncertainty in the Proton Beam
Current was Estimated to be 7-15%.  The Major

Was Caused by the Low Count Rate.  The Uncertainty in

Other Uncertainties were Related to the Efficiency of
The Detector and the Chemical Separation Yield:
Additional Systematic Uncertainties Resulted from the
Cross Section Calculation Using Experimental Results
For Two or More Components of a Compound.
All the Uncertainties were Combined in Quadrature.
The Deviation in the Energy is not an Error,
But the Energy Span Within Each Individual Sample.
